dataset.previous_context: The gardener explained the weeds had taken over.
dataset.dialogue: The mistress of the house said, 'Brilliant! Nothing screams cultivated beauty like rampant vegetation everywhere.'
dataset.after_context: She surveyed the tangled beds with agitation as she pondered how the guests at her party would react.

dataset.previous_context: A royal decree brought news that the king had declared a contest for all fair maidens to win his hand.
dataset.dialogue: Angelina, an eligible maiden with no interest in the king said, 'Oh joy—what a thrilling opportunity to compete for the affection of a total dud'.
dataset.after_context: Her mother rubbed her back in sympathy.

dataset.previous_context: The poet recited his newest work to an expecting audience that over time realized a total lack of interest.
dataset.dialogue: 'Wonderful! I was just hoping to hear a poem that could put an entire room to sleep,' a spectator whispered.
dataset.after_context: As the poem dragged on, the audience prayed for mercy in polite silence.

dataset.previous_context: The office elevator has been broken for three consecutive days.
dataset.dialogue: 'I am so tired of climbing six flights of stairs every morning,' Mark groaned.
dataset.after_context: He sat at his desk, catching his breath and looking exhausted.

dataset.previous_context: The air conditioning in the building stopped working during a heatwave.
dataset.dialogue: 'It is absolutely stifling in here; I can't concentrate on my work,' Sarah complained.
dataset.after_context: She wiped sweat from her forehead and tried to fan herself with a folder.

dataset.previous_context: A coworker had been eating pungent fish at their desk for an hour.
dataset.dialogue: 'That smell is actually making me feel a bit nauseous,' James whispered to his neighbor.
dataset.after_context: He opened a window to try and get some fresh air into the room.

dataset.previous_context: The company announced that there would be no bonuses for the second year in a row.
dataset.dialogue: 'This is really disappointing news after how hard we all worked,' the lead developer said.
dataset.after_context: The room remained silent as everyone processed the financial blow.

dataset.previous_context: Jessica noticed her manager had not washed his gym clothes in weeks.
dataset.dialogue: 'He really needs to use some stronger detergent; the smell is overwhelming,' she told Sarah.
dataset.after_context: Sarah nodded in agreement, keeping her distance from the manager's office.

dataset.previous_context: The software update caused the entire system to crash right before the deadline.
dataset.dialogue: 'This is a total disaster, we're going to lose all our progress,' the intern cried out.
dataset.after_context: He put his head in his hands, staring at the blue screen of death.

dataset.previous_context: Heavy rain started pouring just as the group began their three-mile hike.
dataset.dialogue: 'Now my boots are completely soaked and I'm freezing cold,' the guide muttered.
dataset.after_context: He adjusted his pack and looked gloomily at the muddy trail ahead.

dataset.previous_context: The cafeteria served mystery meat that looked and smelled questionable.
dataset.dialogue: 'I don't think this is safe to eat; it looks undercooked,' the student remarked.
dataset.after_context: He pushed the tray away and decided to just eat an apple instead.

dataset.previous_context: A man on the train was playing loud music through his speakers without headphones.
dataset.dialogue: 'This is so inconsiderate and annoying for everyone else,' a commuter grumbled.
dataset.after_context: She put on her own noise-canceling headphones to drown out the sound.

dataset.previous_context: The printer jammed for the fifth time in a single afternoon.
dataset.dialogue: 'I hate this machine so much, it never works when I'm in a hurry,' the clerk shouted.
dataset.after_context: He kicked the side of the printer in a fit of brief frustration.
